'''sakoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:wumao|wumao]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-k-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wumao|wumao]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| sakoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:sækeyeth|sækeyeth]] || [[word:sækeyej|sækeyej]] || [[word:sækeyesh|sækeyesh]] || [[word:sækeye|sækeye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:sakokoyoth|sakokoyoth]] || [[word:sakokoyoj|sakokoyoj]] || [[word:sakokoyosh|sakokoyosh]] || [[word:sakokoyo|sakokoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:sakoyoth|sakoyoth]] || [[word:sakoyoj|sakoyoj]] || [[word:sakoyosh|sakoyosh]] || [[word:sakoyo|sakoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:sakofyoth|sakofyoth]] || [[word:sakofyoj|sakofyoj]] || [[word:sakofyosh|sakofyosh]] || [[word:sakofyof|sakofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:sakoyotho|sakoyotho]] || [[word:sakoyojo|sakoyojo]] || [[word:sakoyosho|sakoyosho]] || [[word:sakoyoko|sakoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:sakoyoth|sakoyoth]] || [[word:sakoyoj|sakoyoj]] || [[word:sakoyosh|sakoyosh]] || [[word:sakoyo|sakoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:sakoyothol|sakoyothol]] || [[word:sakoyojol|sakoyojol]] || [[word:sakoyoshol|sakoyoshol]] || [[word:sakoyokol|sakoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:sakoyothotho|sakoyothotho]] || [[word:sakoyojojo|sakoyojojo]] || [[word:sakoyoshosho|sakoyoshosho]] || [[word:sakoyoko|sakoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:sakoyothon|sakoyothon]] || [[word:sakoyojon|sakoyojon]] || [[word:sakoyoshon|sakoyoshon]] || [[word:sakoyokon|sakoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:sakoyothoro|sakoyothoro]] || [[word:sakoyojoro|sakoyojoro]] || [[word:sakoyoshoro|sakoyoshoro]] || [[word:sakoyokoro|sakoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
